today.title: Today
today.openCases: {count, plural, =0 {No open cases} one {# open case} other {# open cases}}
today.allQuiet: All quiet. No cases need action.
today.allQuietBody: No open cases and no tasks due. When something needs your attention, it will appear here — sorted by real urgency.

tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.subtitle: Everything open — case work and standalone reminders.
tasks.confirmCancel: Cancel this task? It will be removed from the list.
tasks.empty: No open tasks. Add one above, or from a case.
tasks.onShabbosHint: This due date falls on Shabbos or Yom Tov — you may want an earlier deadline.
tasks.errorCreate: Could not create the task. Please try again.
tasks.errorUpdate: Could not update the task. Please try again.

newPermit.title: New permit
newPermit.subtitle: Type the details, generate the official Israeli permit, and save it as a case.
newPermit.declNote: Company name, title and signatory (IKG Vienna · Funeral Director · Mordechai Hammer) are pre-printed on the form. Signature is added by hand after printing.

hint.id: Printed one character per box — max 10 characters.
hint.fs: Printed one digit per box — max 9 digits.

doc.id_copy: A copy of the deceased's ID
doc.doctor_certificate: Doctor's certificate on cause of death
doc.local_transfer_permit: Permit from local authorities for transfer of body to Israel
doc.sealing_permit: Official permit describing the means used to seal the body
doc.c19_sealing: During C19: body sealed in two plastic bags, inside a metal coffin or two wooden coffins
doc.funeral_acceptance: Certificate from the funeral service stating its willingness to receive the body for burial in Israel
doc.preservation_certificate: Preservation certificate in dry ice / formalin (not required)
doc.moh_permit: Ministry of Health official permit (special cases)

docHe.local_transfer_permit: אישור שלטונות המקום להעברת הגופה לישראל
docHe.sealing_permit: תעודת אריזה רשמית המעידה על איטום הגופה
docHe.c19_sealing: אישור אריזת הגופה בשתי אריזות פלסטיק והכנסתה לארון עם דפנות מתכת / שני ארונות עץ
docHe.funeral_acceptance: אישור חברת הקבורה לקבלת הגופה בשדה התעופה
docHe.preservation_certificate: אישור שימור הגופה בפורמלין / קרח יבש (לא חובה)
docHe.moh_permit: אישור של משרד הבריאות בארץ (במקרים מיוחדים)

review.title: Please check the details
review.docCount: {count, plural, =0 {none marked} one {# marked to attach} other {# marked to attach}}
review.missing: Some required fields are still empty: {fields}. You can still generate.

caseDetail.advanceError: Could not advance the stage. Please try again.
caseDetail.jumpConfirm: Jump this case straight to {stage}? This skips the stages in between and is logged.

empty.documents: No documents yet. The document packet for this stage will appear here.
empty.transport: No transport legs booked. Ground and air-cargo legs will appear here.
empty.contacts: No contacts linked. Family, chevra kadisha, consulate and carriers will appear here.
empty.activity: No activity recorded yet. Every change to this case will be logged here.

documents.confirmDelete: Remove this document from the case? The file will be deleted.

transport.errorSave: Could not save the leg. Please try again.
transport.errorAdvance: Could not advance the leg. Please try again.
transport.errorCustody: Could not record the custody event.

transportPage.title: Transport
transportPage.subtitle: {count, plural, =0 {No active legs} one {# active leg across cases} other {# active legs across cases}}
transportPage.emptyBody: Ground legs and air-cargo bookings from every case appear here — grouped by status, soonest first. Add a leg from a case to see it on the board.

more.title: More
more.intakeLinkBody: Share this link with a family. They can fill in the details and attach documents — their submission arrives in the Intake inbox.
more.about: Offline-first operations hub for burial and repatriation. Phase 0 shell — local mock data only.

intake.title: Family information
intake.subtitle: Details for the Israeli burial transfer permit
intake.lead: We are so sorry for your loss. When you feel able, please share what you know about the person who has passed, and attach any documents you have. Nothing needs to be perfect — the funeral director will help with the rest.
intake.privacy: The details you enter are sent securely to the funeral team to arrange the burial and transfer. They are used only for that purpose. You can ask us to correct or delete them at any time.
intake.consentLabel: I understand and agree that these details will be used to arrange the burial and transfer.

docs.lead: Attach a photo or scan of each document you have. Clear, readable images are best. (Images or PDF, up to 12 MB each.)
docs.id: Copy of the person's ID / passport
docs.doctor: Doctor's certificate on cause of death

intake.reqMissing: Please fill in the required fields (marked *) and accept the privacy note.
intake.errorGeneric: Something went wrong while sending. Please try again in a moment.

thanks.title: Thank you — we have received your details
thanks.body: Your information and documents have reached the funeral team. There is nothing more you need to do right now. If anything else is needed, they will contact you.
thanks.closeHint: You may now close this page.

intakeInbox.title: Family intake
intakeInbox.subtitle: New submissions from families, awaiting review.
intakeInbox.linkBody: Share this with a family to collect their details and documents.
intakeInbox.empty: No new submissions. Family submissions will appear here for review.
intakeInbox.files: {count, plural, =0 {no files} one {# file} other {# files}}
intakeInbox.confirmReject: Reject this submission? It will be marked rejected and hidden from the inbox.

auth.signInBody: Enter your email and we'll send you a one-time sign-in link.
auth.checkEmailBody: We sent a sign-in link to {email}. Open it on this device to continue.
auth.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.footnote: Access is limited to authorized staff. This hub holds sensitive personal data — every sign-in is logged.
auth.noAccessBody: You're signed in, but this account isn't authorized for Derech. Ask an owner to add you, or sign in with an authorized account.
